requirements.note: Only leaf-bladed weapons, broad ammunition, or the Magic Dart spell can harm this monster.
This target flies — use ranged, magic, a halberd, or a salamander to reach it.
Dusk is immune to ranged and magic in every phase — melee only, and you need a rock or granite hammer to land the finishing blow at low HP.
Finish with a rock hammer or granite hammer once its HP is low (about 8 or below).
Finish with a bag of salt at low HP (about 4 or below), or use a brine sabre to bypass this.
Finish with an ice cooler at low HP.
Finish with fungicide spray once its HP is low (about 8 or below).
